question.text: The liquid net worth of a clearing member in the derivatives segment shall not be less than:

answer.text: Rs 50 lakhs at any point of time
Rs 25 lakhs at any point of time
Rs 1 crore at any point of time
Rs 10 lakhs at any point of time

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The clearing member's liquid net worth shall not be less than Rs 50 lakhs at any point of time in the derivatives segment. **The Trap:** This is a continuous minimum requirement, not a one-time deposit. Liquid net worth = total liquid assets minus margins and ELM on open positions. **Cross-Exam Context:** Liquid net worth is a capital adequacy measure specific to derivatives clearing. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Falling below Rs 50 lakhs liquid net worth can trigger restrictions on the clearing member's activities.
